title: MeshSat Android — standalone mobile gateway + pair-shell companion

parent_project.note: Track B of CubeOS — MeshSat. Companion to the meshsat/ Bridge (project 27); peers with meshsat/ and meshsat-hub/ in the 3-node mesh.

_bounded_contexts_note: 1:1 with real top-level packages under app/src/main/java/com/cubeos/meshsat/ (CGC-verified 2026-05-18, 29 packages + root). 'root' covers MainActivity.kt + MeshSatApp.kt.
release_workflow: manual gradle build + APK release on tag

parallel_dev_exception.workflow: merge/<feature_id> short-lived branch + 1 MR per feature + auto-delete branch on merge

security_posture: private network app; mTLS to paired bridges; Android Keystore for client cert + private keys; never store private key bytes outside Keystore
build_host_note: Build runs on nllei01androidsdk01 (Android SDK + JDK 17 host). Workers + CI invoke gradlew via SSH per ADR-0002. Local-workstation gradle is not supported.
_surfaces_note: http_api=true because LocalApiServer (NanoHTTPD on 127.0.0.1) exposes a REST surface for automation per api/LocalApiServer.kt. persistent_data=true because Room database has 18 entities (current version 14).
